```{r}
svydesign(id = ~1, data = data_participant_2023 |> filter(!is.na(stabilized_weight)), weights = ~stabilized_weight) |> 
  as_survey() |> 
  select(age_2023, age_group_2023, sex, nationality_group_short, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile) |>
  tbl_svysummary(type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ c("{n_unweighted} ({p})")),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              percent = "column",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1))


```


Standardized difference after weighting

```{r}

table_participant_2023 <- svydesign(id = ~1, data = data_participant_2023 |> filter(!is.na(stabilized_weight)), weights = ~stabilized_weight) |> 
  as_survey() |> 
  select(age_group_2023, sex, nationality_group_short, swiss_sep_3_quintile) |>
  tbl_svysummary(type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ c("{n_unweighted} ({p})")),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              percent = "column",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 5,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1))


table_participant_2023 <- table_participant_2023 |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  rename("Group" = "**Characteristic**", "output" = "**N = 82,066**") |> 
  mutate(Group = case_when(Group == "Infancy: <1" ~ "Infancy: <1",
                           Group == "Preschool age: 1–5" ~ "Preschool age: 1–5",
                           Group == "School age: 6–11" ~ "School age: 6–11",
                           Group == "Early adolescence: 12–15" ~ "Early adolescence: 12–15",
                           Group == "Late adolescence: 16–19" ~ "Late adolescence: 16–19",
                           Group == "Male" ~ "Male",
                           Group == "Female" ~ "Female",
                           Group == "Swiss" ~ "Swiss",
                           Group == "European" ~ "European",
                           Group == "Non-European" ~ "Non-European",
                           Group == "Missing" ~ "Missing",
                           Group == "1" ~ "Quntile 1",
                           Group == "2" ~ "Quntile 2",
                           Group == "3" ~ "Quntile 3",
                           Group == "4" ~ "Quntile 4",
                           Group == "5" ~ "Quntile 5")) |> 
  filter(!is.na(Group))


table_participant_2023 <- table_participant_2023 |> 
  separate(
    col = output, 
    into = c("n", "proportion"), 
    sep = " \\("
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    n = str_remove_all(n, ","),
    proportion = str_remove_all(proportion, "[%\\)]")
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    n = as.numeric(n),
    proportion = as.numeric(proportion)
  ) |> 
  mutate(proportion = as.numeric(proportion)/100)

table_participant_2023 <- table_participant_2023 |> 
  rename("n_SwissPedGrowth" = "n", "proportion_SwissPedGrowth" = "proportion")


standardized_difference_table <- Genpop_summary_statistics_2023 |>
  left_join(table_participant_2023, by = "Group")


standardized_difference_table <- standardized_difference_table |> 
  mutate(SPD = 2*(asin(sqrt(proportion_SwissPedGrowth)) - asin(sqrt(proportion_genpop))))

standardized_difference_table |> select(Group, proportion_SwissPedGrowth, proportion_genpop, SPD) |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) format(x, scientific = FALSE)))

```






## Table 2: Visit's characteristics

```{r}

data_visit_week |> select(visit_week_type) |> tbl_summary()

data_visit_week |> 
  select(visit_week_type, sex, age_years_visit_week_start, age_group, nationality_group_short, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile, hospital, general_consent, diagnosis_affecting_growth) |>
  tbl_summary(by = "visit_week_type",
              type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ c("{n} ({p})")),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              percent = "column",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1)) |> 
  add_overall()

```

Some inpatient visits don't have a diagnosis!

```{r}


data_case |> 
  filter(case_carehandling == "Inpatient care") |> 
  left_join(data_diagnoses |> select(diagnosis_affecting_growth, case_id) |> group_by(case_id) |> slice(1) |> ungroup(), by = "case_id") |> 
  select(hospital, diagnosis_affecting_growth) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = hospital)

```


## Aim 1: Availability

Total number of measurements

```{r}

data_height_original |> 
  select(height_id, hospital_coded) |> 
  mutate(number_measurements = "Height") |> 
  bind_rows(data_weight_original |> select(weight_id, hospital_coded) |> mutate(number_measurements = "Weight")) |> 
  bind_rows(data_bmi |> select(weight_id, hospital_coded) |> mutate(number_measurements = "Body Mass Index")) |>
  bind_rows(data_head |> select(circumference_id, hospital_coded) |> mutate(number_measurements = "Head circumference")) |> 
  select(number_measurements, hospital_coded) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = hospital_coded,
              statistic = everything() ~ "{n}",
              label = list(number_measurements = "Number of recorded values")) |> 
  add_overall()

```

### eTable: Per patient


```{r}
data_participant |> 
  select(height_measurement, number_height_measurements, weight_measurement, number_weight_measurements, head_measurement, number_head_measurements, bmi_measurement, number_bmi_measurements) |> 
  tbl_summary(type = all_continuous() ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ "{median} [{p25}, {p75}]",
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)")
```


### eTable: Per hospital visit

```{r}

data_visit_week |>  
  select(visit_week_type, height_measurement, number_height_measurements, weight_measurement, number_weight_measurements, head_measurement, number_head_measurements, bmi_measurement, number_bmi_measurements) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "visit_week_type",
              type = list(c("number_height_measurements", "number_weight_measurements", "number_head_measurements", "number_bmi_measurements") ~ "continuous2",
                          all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ "{median} [{p25}, {p75}]",
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

```

### eTable: Compare visit characteristis with and without measurement


```{r}

data_visit_week |>
  mutate(height_measurement = case_when(height_measurement == "No height" ~ "No height",
                                                    TRUE ~ "Height available")) |> 
  select(height_measurement) |>
  tbl_summary()

data_visit_week |>
  mutate(height_measurement = case_when(height_measurement == "No height" ~ "No height",
                                                    TRUE ~ "Height available")) |> 
  select(height_measurement, sex, age_years_visit_week_start, age_group, nationality_group_short, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile, hospital_coded, general_consent, visit_week_type) |>
  tbl_summary(by = "height_measurement",
              type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              percent = "row",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1)) |> 
  add_p(test = list("swiss_sep_3" ~ "t.test",
                    "age_years_visit_week_start" ~ "wilcox.test",
                    all_categorical() ~ "chisq.test")) |> 
  add_overall()

```


```{r}

data_visit_week |>
  mutate(weight_measurement = case_when(weight_measurement == "No weight" ~ "No weight",
                                                    TRUE ~ "weight available")) |> 
  select(weight_measurement) |>
  tbl_summary()

data_visit_week |>
  mutate(weight_measurement = factor(case_when(weight_measurement == "No weight" ~ "No weight",
                                                    TRUE ~ "Weight available"),
                                     levels = c("Weight available", "No weight"))) |> 
  select(weight_measurement, sex, age_years_visit_week_start, age_group, nationality_group_short, swiss_sep_3, swiss_sep_3_quintile, hospital_coded, general_consent, visit_week_type) |>
  tbl_summary(by = "weight_measurement",
              type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous2"),
              statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}"),
                               all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)",
              percent = "row",
              digits = list(all_categorical() ~ 0,
                            all_continuous() ~ 1)) |> 
  add_p(test = list("swiss_sep_3" ~ "t.test",
                    "age_years_visit_week_start" ~ "wilcox.test",
                    all_categorical() ~ "chisq.test")) |> 
  modify_fmt_fun(
    p.value = function(x) {
      ifelse(
        x < 0.0001, 
        "<0.0001", 
        format(round(x, 4), nsmall = 4))  # Show 4 decimal places
    }
  ) |> 
  add_overall()

```

### Figure 1: Per visit by hospital, by visit type, by age group

Height

```{r}

plot_data <- data_visit_week |>
  mutate(height_measurement = case_when(number_height_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                                TRUE ~ "no")) |>
  select(hospital_coded, height_measurement, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  group_by(hospital_coded, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  count(height_measurement) |>
  ungroup() |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = height_measurement,
              values_from = n,
              values_fill = 0) |>
  mutate(total = yes + no,
         yes_prop = yes / total) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    ci = list(prop.test(yes, total)$conf.int),
    ci_lower = ci[1],
    ci_upper = ci[2]
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-ci)

plot_height_by_hospital_coded_outpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Outpatient visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age group (years)",
                    values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with height",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Outpatient visit")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_height_by_hospital_coded_outpatient

plot_height_by_hospital_coded_ER <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "ER visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age group (years)",
                    values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with height",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Emergency visit")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_height_by_hospital_coded_ER

plot_height_by_hospital_coded_inpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Inpatient stay") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Age group (years)",
                    values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with height",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Inpatient stay")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_height_by_hospital_coded_inpatient




```


Weight

```{r}

plot_data <- data_visit_week |>
  mutate(weight_measurement = case_when(number_weight_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                                TRUE ~ "no")) |>
  select(hospital_coded, weight_measurement, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  group_by(hospital_coded, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  count(weight_measurement) |>
  ungroup() |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = weight_measurement,
              values_from = n,
              values_fill = 0) |>
  mutate(total = yes + no,
         yes_prop = yes / total) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    ci = list(prop.test(yes, total)$conf.int),
    ci_lower = ci[1],
    ci_upper = ci[2]
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-ci)

plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_outpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Outpatient visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with weight",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Outpatient visit",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_outpatient

plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_ER <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "ER visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with weight",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Emergency visit",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_ER

plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_inpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Inpatient stay") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Stays (%) with weight",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Inpatient stay",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.25, "cm"))

plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_inpatient

```


Combined

```{r}

plot_height_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded <- plot_grid(plotlist = c(plot_height_by_hospital_coded_outpatient + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_height_by_hospital_coded_ER + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_height_by_hospital_coded_inpatient + theme(legend.position = "None")),
                                                       ncol = 1)

plot_weight_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded <- plot_grid(plotlist = c(plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_outpatient + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_ER + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_inpatient + theme(legend.position = "None")),
                                                       ncol = 1)

plot_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded <- plot_grid(plotlist = c(plot_height_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "cm")),
                                                                    plot_weight_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded+ theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "cm"))),
                                                       ncol = 2,
                                                       labels = c("Height", "Weight"),
                                                       label_x = 0.5,
                                                       hjust = 0.5)

plot_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded

get_legend2 <- function(a.gplot){
  if (!gtable::is.gtable(a.gplot))
    a.gplot <- ggplotGrob(a.gplot)
  leg <- which(sapply(a.gplot$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
  a.gplot$grobs[[leg]]
}

plot_legend <- get_legend2(plot_weight_by_hospital_coded_inpatient + theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                                                                           legend.title.position ="top",
                                                                           legend.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)))

plot_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend <- plot_grid(plotlist = list(plot_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded,
                                                                              plot_legend),
                                                                 ncol = 1,
                                                                 rel_heights = c(1, 0.1))

plot_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend

ggsave(plot_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend.svg"), width = 18, height = 22, units = "cm")


```


#### eFigure: HC and BMI by hospital_coded, visity type, age group

HC

```{r}

plot_data <- data_visit_week |>
  mutate(head_measurement = case_when(number_head_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                                TRUE ~ "no")) |>
  select(hospital_coded, head_measurement, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  group_by(hospital_coded, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  count(head_measurement) |>
  ungroup() |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = head_measurement,
              values_from = n,
              values_fill = 0) |>
  mutate(total = yes + no,
         yes_prop = yes / total) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    ci = list(prop.test(yes, total)$conf.int),
    ci_lower = ci[1],
    ci_upper = ci[2]
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-ci)

plot_head_by_hospital_coded_outpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Outpatient visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with HC",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Outpatient visit",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_head_by_hospital_coded_outpatient

plot_head_by_hospital_coded_ER <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "ER visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with HC",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Emergency visit",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_head_by_hospital_coded_ER

plot_head_by_hospital_coded_inpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Inpatient stay") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Stays (%) with HC",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Inpatient stay",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_head_by_hospital_coded_inpatient




```


BMI

```{r}

plot_data <- data_visit_week |>
  mutate(bmi_measurement = case_when(number_bmi_measurements >= 1 ~ "yes",
                                                TRUE ~ "no")) |>
  select(hospital_coded, bmi_measurement, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  group_by(hospital_coded, visit_week_type, age_group) |>
  count(bmi_measurement) |>
  ungroup() |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = bmi_measurement,
              values_from = n,
              values_fill = 0) |>
  mutate(total = yes + no,
         yes_prop = yes / total) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    ci = list(prop.test(yes, total)$conf.int),
    ci_lower = ci[1],
    ci_upper = ci[2]
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-ci)

plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_outpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Outpatient visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with BMI",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Outpatient visit",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_outpatient

plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_ER <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "ER visit") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Visits (%) with BMI",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Emergency visit",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"))

plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_ER

plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_inpatient <- plot_data |> 
  filter(visit_week_type == "Inpatient stay") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = hospital_coded, y = yes_prop, fill = age_group)) + 
  geom_col(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.75)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey80", "grey60", "grey40", "grey20", "grey10"))+
  labs(y = "Stays (%) with BMI",
       x = "Hospital",
       title = "Inpatient stay",
       fill = "Age group (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        title = element_text(color = "black", size = 8, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.25, "cm"))

plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_inpatient

```


Combined

```{r}

plot_head_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded <- plot_grid(plotlist = c(plot_head_by_hospital_coded_outpatient + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_head_by_hospital_coded_ER + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_head_by_hospital_coded_inpatient + theme(legend.position = "None")),
                                                       ncol = 1)

plot_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded <- plot_grid(plotlist = c(plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_outpatient + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_ER + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                                                    plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_inpatient + theme(legend.position = "None")),
                                                       ncol = 1)

plot_HC_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded <- plot_grid(plotlist = c(plot_head_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "cm")),
                                                                    plot_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded+ theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "cm"))),
                                                       ncol = 2,
                                                       labels = c("Head circumference", "Body mass index"),
                                                       label_x = 0.5,
                                                       hjust = 0.5)

plot_HC_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded

get_legend2 <- function(a.gplot){
  if (!gtable::is.gtable(a.gplot))
    a.gplot <- ggplotGrob(a.gplot)
  leg <- which(sapply(a.gplot$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
  a.gplot$grobs[[leg]]
}

plot_legend <- get_legend2(plot_bmi_by_hospital_coded_inpatient + theme(legend.position = "bottom",
                                                                           legend.title.position ="top",
                                                                           legend.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)))

plot_HC_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend <- plot_grid(plotlist = list(plot_HC_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded,
                                                                              plot_legend),
                                                                 ncol = 1,
                                                                 rel_heights = c(1, 0.1))

plot_HC_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend

ggsave(plot_HC_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_HC_bmi_availability_per_visit_by_hospital_coded_with_legend.svg"), width = 18, height = 22, units = "cm")


```


## Aim 2: Quality


### eTable : Growthclenr output

```{r}

data_height_original |> 
  select(gcr_result) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of heights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)


data_weight_original |> 
  select(gcr_result) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of weights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)

```

### eTable: manual result

```{r}

data_height_original |> 
  select(manual_result_fct) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of heights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)


data_weight_original |> 
  select(manual_result_fct) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of weights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)

```


### eTable: Quality

```{r}

data_height_original |> 
  select(combined_result_fct) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of heights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)


data_weight_original |> 
  select(combined_result_fct) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of weights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)


data_head |> 
  select(manual_result_fct) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of weights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)


data_bmi |> 
  select(combined_result_fct) |> 
  tbl_summary(statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
              missing = "ifany",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss})",
              label = list(result = "Quality of weights"),
              digits = everything() ~ 0)

```



### Figure 1: Sankey-plot of height and weight quality


```{r}

data_sankey_height <- data_height_original |> 
  mutate(manual_result_fct = factor(case_when(
    manual_result_fct == "Include - No error" ~ "No error",
    manual_result_fct == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ "Corrected error",
    manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected unit error" ~ "Corrected error",
    manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected decimal point error" ~ "Corrected error",
    manual_result_fct == "Duplicate - Carried forward" ~ "Duplicate",
    manual_result_fct == "Duplicate - Same day" ~ "Duplicate",
    manual_result_fct == "Exclude - Z-score" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    manual_result_fct == "Missing - Negative age" ~ "Invalid",
    manual_result_fct == "Missing - Zero or negative recording" ~ "Invalid"),
    levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error"))) %>%
  mutate(growthcleanr_result_fct = factor(case_when(
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Include - No error" ~ "No error",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Include - Corrected swapped measurements" ~ "Corrected error",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Duplicate - Carried forward" ~ "Duplicate",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Duplicate - Same day" ~ "Duplicate",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Exclude - Single outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Exclude - Longitudinal outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Missing" ~ "Invalid"
  ), levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error"))) %>%
  mutate(combined_result_fct = factor(case_when(
    combined_result_fct == "Include - No-Error" ~ "No error",
    combined_result_fct == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ "Corrected error",
    combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Corrected error",
    combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Corrected error",
    combined_result_fct == "Carried-Forward" ~ "Duplicate",
    combined_result_fct == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
    combined_result_fct == "Exclude - Single-Outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    combined_result_fct == "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    combined_result_fct == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    combined_result_fct == "Missing - Age" ~ "Invalid",
    combined_result_fct == "Missing - Recording" ~ "Invalid"
  ), levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error"))) |> 
  select(height_id, manual_result_fct, growthcleanr_result_fct, combined_result_fct) |> 
  count(manual_result_fct, growthcleanr_result_fct, combined_result_fct)

data_sankey_height <- data_sankey_height |> 
  pivot_stages_longer(stages_from = c("manual_result_fct",  "combined_result_fct", "growthcleanr_result_fct"),
                      values_from = "n") |> 
  mutate(node = factor(node, levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error")),
         stage = factor(stage, levels = c("manual_result_fct",  "combined_result_fct", "growthcleanr_result_fct"),
                        labels = c("Own algorithm", "Combined", "Growthcleanr")))

v_space = round(data_height_original |> nrow()/12)

pos <- position_sankey(split_nodes = FALSE, align = "top",
                       width = 0.6, v_space = v_space, order = "as_is")

node_labels <- data_sankey_height %>%
  filter((stage == "Own algorithm" & connector == "from") | (stage == "Combined" & connector == "from") | (stage == "Growthcleanr" & connector == "to")) |> 
  group_by(stage, node) %>%
  summarize(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() |>  
  group_by(stage) |> 
  arrange(node) |> 
  mutate(sum = sum(n),
         prop = n/sum,
         label = paste0(format(n, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE), " (", ifelse(round(prop*100)>=1, round(prop*100), "<1"), "%)"),
         y = cumsum(n) + v_space * (4-(n()-row_number())) - n/2)

data_sankey_height <- data_sankey_height |> 
  left_join(node_labels |> select(stage, node, y, label), by = c("stage", "node"))

data_sankey_height <- data_sankey_height %>%
  mutate(
    edge_color = case_when(
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "to"  ~ node,      # coming from left → use left node
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "from" ~ node,     # going to right → use right node
      connector == "from" ~ node,
      TRUE ~ node
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(edge_id) %>%
  mutate(
    edge_color = case_when(
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "to"   ~ node[connector == "from"], # from left
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "from" ~ node[connector == "to"],   # from right
      connector == "from" ~ node,
      TRUE ~ node
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()



plot_sankey_height <- data_sankey_height |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = n, group = node, connector = connector, edge_id = edge_id)) +
  geom_sankeyedge(position = pos, aes(fill = edge_color, color = edge_color)) +
  geom_sankeynode(position = pos, aes(fill = node, color = node)) +
  geom_label(aes(x = stage, y = y, label = label),
            fill="white", color = "black", size = 3.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top", expand = c(0, 0), labels = c("Self-developed\nalgorithm", "Combined\nalgorithms", "Growthcleanr\nalgorithm")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Result",
                    values = c(
    "No error" = "#0080a4",
    "Corrected error" = "#36b5b6",
    "Duplicate" = "#c2b600",
    "Biologically implausible outlier" = "#e6002e",
    "Invalid" = "black"
  )) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "No error" = "#0080a4",
    "Corrected error" = "#36b5b6",
    "Duplicate" = "#c2b600",
    "Biologically implausible outlier" = "#e6002e",
    "Invalid" = "black"
  ), guide = "none") +
  theme_void()+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, margin = margin(b = 0)),
    legend.position = "None",
    plot.margin = unit(c(b = 1, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm")
  )

plot_sankey_height

```

```{r}

data_sankey_weight <- data_weight_original |> 
  mutate(manual_result_fct = factor(case_when(
    manual_result_fct == "Include - No error" ~ "No error",
    manual_result_fct == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ "Corrected error",
    manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected unit error" ~ "Corrected error",
    manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected decimal point error" ~ "Corrected error",
    manual_result_fct == "Duplicate - Carried forward" ~ "Duplicate",
    manual_result_fct == "Duplicate - Same day" ~ "Duplicate",
    manual_result_fct == "Exclude - Z-score" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    manual_result_fct == "Missing - Negative age" ~ "Invalid",
    manual_result_fct == "Missing - Zero or negative recording" ~ "Invalid"),
    levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error"))) %>%
  mutate(growthcleanr_result_fct = factor(case_when(
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Include - No error" ~ "No error",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Include - Corrected swapped measurements" ~ "Corrected error",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Duplicate - Carried forward" ~ "Duplicate",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Duplicate - Same day" ~ "Duplicate",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Exclude - Single outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Exclude - Longitudinal outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    growthcleanr_result_fct == "Missing" ~ "Invalid"
  ), levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error"))) %>%
  mutate(combined_result_fct = factor(case_when(
    combined_result_fct == "Include - No-Error" ~ "No error",
    combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Corrected error",
    combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Corrected error",
    combined_result_fct == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ "Corrected error",
    combined_result_fct == "Carried-Forward" ~ "Duplicate",
    combined_result_fct == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
    combined_result_fct == "Exclude - Single-Outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    combined_result_fct == "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    combined_result_fct == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Biologically implausible outlier",
    combined_result_fct == "Missing - Age" ~ "Invalid",
    combined_result_fct == "Missing - Recording" ~ "Invalid"
  ), levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error"))) |> 
  select(weight_id, manual_result_fct, growthcleanr_result_fct, combined_result_fct) |> 
  count(manual_result_fct, growthcleanr_result_fct, combined_result_fct)

data_sankey_weight <- data_sankey_weight |> 
  pivot_stages_longer(stages_from = c("manual_result_fct",  "combined_result_fct", "growthcleanr_result_fct"),
                      values_from = "n") |> 
  mutate(node = factor(node, levels = c("Invalid", "Biologically implausible outlier", "Duplicate", "Corrected error", "No error")),
         stage = factor(stage, levels = c("manual_result_fct",  "combined_result_fct", "growthcleanr_result_fct"),
                        labels = c("Own algorithm", "Combined", "Growthcleanr")))

v_space = round(data_weight_original |> nrow()/12)

pos <- position_sankey(split_nodes = FALSE, align = "top",
                       width = 0.6, v_space = v_space, order = "as_is")

node_labels <- data_sankey_weight %>%
  filter((stage == "Own algorithm" & connector == "from") | (stage == "Combined" & connector == "from") | (stage == "Growthcleanr" & connector == "to")) |> 
  group_by(stage, node) %>%
  summarize(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() |>  
  group_by(stage) |> 
  arrange(node) |> 
  mutate(sum = sum(n),
         prop = n/sum,
         label = paste0(format(n, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE), " (", ifelse(round(prop*100)>=1, round(prop*100), "<1"), "%)"),
         y = cumsum(n) + v_space * (4-(n()-row_number())) - n/2)

data_sankey_weight <- data_sankey_weight |> 
  left_join(node_labels |> select(stage, node, y, label), by = c("stage", "node"))

data_sankey_weight <- data_sankey_weight %>%
  mutate(
    edge_color = case_when(
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "to"  ~ node,      # coming from left → use left node
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "from" ~ node,     # going to right → use right node
      connector == "from" ~ node,
      TRUE ~ node
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(edge_id) %>%
  mutate(
    edge_color = case_when(
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "to"   ~ node[connector == "from"], # from left
      stage == "Combined" & connector == "from" ~ node[connector == "to"],   # from right
      connector == "from" ~ node,
      TRUE ~ node
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()



plot_sankey_weight <- data_sankey_weight |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = n, group = node, connector = connector, edge_id = edge_id)) +
  geom_sankeyedge(position = pos, aes(fill = edge_color, color = edge_color)) +
  geom_sankeynode(position = pos, aes(fill = node, color = node)) +
  geom_label(aes(x = stage, y = y, label = label),
            fill="white", color = "black", size = 3.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top", expand = c(0, 0), labels = c("Self-developed\nalgorithm", "Combined\nalgorithms", "Growthcleanr\nalgorithm")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Result",
                    values = c(
    "No error" = "#0080a4",
    "Corrected error" = "#36b5b6",
    "Duplicate" = "#c2b600",
    "Biologically implausible outlier" = "#e6002e",
    "Invalid" = "black"
  )) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "No error" = "#0080a4",
    "Corrected error" = "#36b5b6",
    "Duplicate" = "#c2b600",
    "Biologically implausible outlier" = "#e6002e",
    "Invalid" = "black"
  ), guide = "none") +
  theme_void()+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, margin = margin(b = 0)),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = unit(c(b = 1, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm")
  )

plot_sankey_weight



plot_legend <- get_legend2(plot_sankey_weight + theme(plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 0, r = 10, l = 10), "pt"),
                                                      legend.title = element_blank()))

plot_sankey <- plot_grid(plot_sankey_height,
                         plot_sankey_weight + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                         plot_legend,
                         ncol=1,
                         rel_heights = c(1,1,0.1),
                         align = "h",
                         axis = "l",
                         labels = c("Height", "Weight"),
                         label_x = c(-0.02, -0.02))

ggsave(plot_sankey, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_sankey.svg"), width = 18, height = 22, units = "cm")

```

### Figure 2: Included vs. excluded height, weight, BMI over age

Height

```{r}

plot_height_before_cleaning <- data_height_original |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_height, y = original_height_cm))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "black", fill = "black")+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 220), expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Original dataset")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Height (cm)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_height_before_cleaning

plot_height_during_cleaning <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(include = case_when(combined_result == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_height, y = height_cm, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#e6002e", "#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 220), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(color = "Height quality")+
  ggtitle("Data cleaning")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Height (cm)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_height_during_cleaning

plot_height_after_cleaning <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(include = case_when(combined_result == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  filter(include == "Included") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_height, y = height_cm, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Include"), values = c("#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 220), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(color = "Height quality")+
  ggtitle("Cleaned dataset")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Height (cm)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_height_quality <- plot_grid(plot_height_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                 plot_height_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                 plot_height_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                 ncol = 3,
                                 align = "hv")

plot_height_quality

```

weight

```{r}

plot_weight_before_cleaning <- data_weight_original |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_weight, y = original_weight_kg))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "black", fill = "black")+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 250), expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle(" ")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Weight (kg)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 0, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_weight_during_cleaning <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(include = case_when(combined_result == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_weight, y = weight_kg, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#e6002e", "#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 250), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(color = "weight quality")+
  ggtitle(" ")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Weight (kg)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 0, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_weight_during_cleaning

plot_weight_after_cleaning <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(include = case_when(combined_result == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  filter(include == "Included") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_weight, y = weight_kg, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Include"), values = c("#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 250), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(color = "Weight quality")+
  ggtitle(" ")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Weight (kg)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 0, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_weight_quality <- plot_grid(plot_weight_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                 plot_weight_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                 plot_weight_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                 ncol = 3,
                                 align = "hv")

plot_weight_quality

```


```{r}
plot_for_legend <- data_weight_clean |> 
  head(3) |> 
  mutate(color = case_when(row_number() == 1 ~ "Original recording",
                           row_number() == 2 ~ "Excluded recording",
                           row_number() == 3 ~ "Included recording")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_weight, y = weight_kg, color = color))+
  geom_point()+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Original recording", "Excluded recording", "Included recording"), values = c("black", "#e6002e", "#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 250), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(color = "weight quality")+
  ggtitle(" ")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Weight (kg)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 0.5, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))


```


```{r}
get_legend2 <- function(a.gplot){
  if (!gtable::is.gtable(a.gplot))
    a.gplot <- ggplotGrob(a.gplot)
  leg <- which(sapply(a.gplot$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
  a.gplot$grobs[[leg]]
}

plot_legend <- get_legend2(plot_for_legend + theme(legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = 'white', colour = 'white'),
                                                   plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "white")))

plot_quality_height_weight <- plot_grid(plot_height_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_height_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_height_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_weight_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_weight_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_weight_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                          ncol = 3,
                          align = "hv")

plot_quality_height_weight_with_legend <- plot_grid(plot_quality_height_weight,
                                                    plot_legend,
                                                    ncol = 2,
                                                    rel_widths = c(1,0.2))


ggsave(plot_quality_height_weight_with_legend, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_quality_height_weight_with_legend.png"), width = 26, height = 16, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg = "white")

```


#### eFigure: included vs excluded HC and BMI



Head circumference

```{r}

plot_head_before_cleaning <- data_head |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_circumference, y = original_head_cm))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "black", fill = "black")+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 65), expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Original dataset")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Head circumference (cm)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_head_during_cleaning <- data_head |> 
  mutate(include = case_when(manual_result_fct == "Include - No error" ~ "Included",
                             manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected unit error" ~ "Included",
                             manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected decimal point error" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_circumference, y = head_cm, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Exclude", "Include"), values = c("#e6002e", "#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 65), expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Data cleaning")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Head circumference (cm)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_head_after_cleaning <- data_head |> 
  mutate(include = case_when(manual_result_fct == "Include - No error" ~ "Included",
                             manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected unit error" ~ "Included",
                             manual_result_fct == "Include - Corrected decimal point error" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  filter(include == "Included") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_circumference, y = head_cm, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Include"), values = c( "#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 65), expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Cleaned dataset")+
  xlab("Age (years)")+
  ylab("Head circumference (cm)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_head_quality <- plot_grid(plot_head_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                               plot_head_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                               plot_head_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                 ncol = 3,
                                 align = "hv")

plot_head_quality

```

BMI

```{r}

plot_bmi_before_cleaning <- data_bmi |>
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_bmi, y = bmi))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, color = "black", fill = "black")+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 65), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(y = bquote(Body~mass~index~(kg/m^2)),
       x = "Age (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_bmi_during_cleaning <- data_bmi |>
  mutate(include = case_when(combined_result_fct == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Swapped-Measurements" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_bmi, y = bmi, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Excluded", "Included"), values = c("#e6002e", "#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 65), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(y = bquote(Body~mass~index~(kg/m^2)),
       x = "Age (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_bmi_after_cleaning <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(include = case_when(combined_result_fct == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Included",
                             combined_result_fct == "Include - Corrected-Swapped-Measurements" ~ "Included",
                             TRUE ~ "Excluded")) |> 
  filter(include == "Included") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = age_years_bmi, y = bmi, color = include))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2)+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Included"), values = c( "#0080a4"))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 65), expand = c(0,0))+
  labs(y = bquote(Body~mass~index~(kg/m^2)),
       x = "Age (years)")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=10, color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(b = 0, t = 1, r = 0.5, l = 0.5), "cm"))

plot_bmi_quality <- plot_grid(plot_bmi_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                              plot_bmi_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                              plot_bmi_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                              ncol = 3,
                              align = "hv")

plot_bmi_quality

```

Combined plots

```{r}

plot_quality_HC_bmi <- plot_grid(plot_head_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_head_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_head_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_bmi_before_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_bmi_during_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                                        plot_bmi_after_cleaning + theme(legend.position = "None"),
                          ncol = 3,
                          align = "hv")

plot_quality_HC_bmi_with_legend <- plot_grid(plot_quality_HC_bmi,
                                                    plot_legend,
                                                    ncol = 2,
                                                    rel_widths = c(1,0.2))


ggsave(plot_quality_HC_bmi_with_legend, filename = here("output", "figures", "plot_quality_HC_bmi_with_legend.png"), width = 26, height = 16, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg = "white")


```
